originalTitle: Rocket League x Unreal Engine 6 - Official Reveal Announcement Trailer
content: Don't miss the Unreal Engine 6 Reveal Announcement for Rocket League, the hit action vehicular football (soccer) game developed by Psyonix and Epic Games. Players can get the first look at the new era of Rocket League announced at the Paris Majors, with the reveal of a new version of Rocket League coming soon that's powered by Unreal Engine 6. Get the first look at Unreal Engine 6 in Rocket League, coming soon to consoles and PC. #ign #gaming
chineseContent: 不要错过《火箭联盟》的虚幻引擎 6 发布公告，这是一款由 Psyonix 和 Epic Games 开发的热门动作车辆足球游戏。玩家可以抢先体验巴黎特锦赛上宣布的《火箭联盟》新时代，即将推出由虚幻引擎 6 驱动的新版本《火箭联盟》。抢先体验《火箭联盟》中的虚幻引擎 6，即将登陆游戏机和 PC。 #ign #游戏
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
